title: Form End node stuck in waiting state
symptom: The Form End node remains in a 'waiting for form submission' state and does not execute. The workflow does not proceed until the form is submitted.
not_this_if: Running n8n without a reverse proxy
Form submissions are being processed correctly
root_cause: When self-hosting n8n behind a reverse proxy, the webhook URLs may not be configured correctly, causing the Form End node to not receive the submission callback. This can lead to the node being stuck in a waiting state indefinitely.
fix_steps: Add a WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to your n8n setup
Ensure the URL points to the correct endpoint for your reverse proxy
Restart n8n to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Configure the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable in your n8n setup to resolve the waiting state issue.
